acquisition method: The QExactive HF was operated in data-dependent mode
collision energy: The normalized collision energy was set to 27% for HCD
enrichment method: Anti-FLAG immunoprecipitates were separated by SDS-PAGE
fractionation method: Anti-FLAG immunoprecipitates were separated by SDS-PAGE
fragmentation method: The normalized collision energy was set to 27% for HCD
instrument: analyzed by LC/MS/MS using an Easy nLC 1200 coupled to a QExactive HF mass spectrometer
labeling: Samples for protein analysis by immunoblot were lysed in NETN buffer
